name: @hathor/ct-crypto-mobile
description: React Native (iOS/Android) shielded crypto provider for Hathor confidential transactions. Rust core over UniFFI, bridged as a native module; implements the @hathor/ct-crypto-provider interface.

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "const fs=require('fs');for (const p of ['ios/HathorCtCrypto.xcframework','android/src/main/jniLibs']) if (!fs.existsSync(p)) { console.error('missing native binaries: '+p+' — publish from the CI npm-package-mobile artifact, not the repo checkout'); process.exit(1); }"
